title: Sintez-2 mainboard — wiring / netlist (intermediate, pre-KiCad/SimulIDE)
status: v0.3 — all blocks have confirmed members + types; connectors X1-X9 + power table captured from the 600-800 dpi redraw render (Sintez_II_orig.sch). X8 full Z80-bus pinout, X7 TV pinout high-confidence. Pin-accurate intra-block nets still TODO (T2).
primary_source_note: The redraw 'sintez2-original.pdf' is the primary net-naming source: blue=net labels, dark-red=parts, other colors=wire groups. Per-color layer separations in schematics/tiles-color/layers/ isolate net groups for tracing.
intent: This JSON is the canonical machine-readable wiring. bridge/net2sim.py and the KiCad authoring step consume it; it is filled incrementally, one block at a time, with confidence flags.
net_naming: Bus members are NAME<n> (e.g. A0..A15, D0..D7). Active-low signals carry _N suffix here (schematic shows overbar).
vfetch_note: K8..K12 = video-fetch address bits: D5 (К1533КП11 quad 2:1 mux, CORRECTED from КП12) makes K8/K9/K11/K12 from the V-counters; K10 from D7B (ЛИ1). The arbitration muxes D23/D24/D25/D26 (КП12 dual 4:1) select CPU address (A*) vs video address (K*) onto VADDR for the DRAM. This is the bus-arbitration core.
global_nets_note: Net 'a' (red pentagon global label in the redraw) = GND/0V — confirmed by the trace-verify workflow (it sits on GND triangle symbols across the sync counters). It ties counter data-inputs, shift-register OE/SI, etc. to ground. 'a2' is a DISTINCT local label (e.g. D45 PE), not GND.

dram_addr_map.comment: К565РУ5 (D28) multiplexed address pin -> VADDR net (from gap_bot_center)

pixel.notes: async to CPU; drives ИР16 pixel chain

blocks.status: pinout from power table + tile r3c1; verify gate connections of D20 WAIT logic

blocks.role: H/V counters from pixel clock generate HSYNC/VSYNC/CSYNC, blanking, and DRAM refresh addresses
blocks.status: designators identified; counter cascade and sync-decode gates TODO

blocks.role: CROWN JEWEL — mux CPU address (A*) vs video-fetch address (K*) onto VADDR; latch row/col for DRAM
blocks.detail: D5 КП12 makes K8-K12 from V-counters; D23/D24/D25/D26 КП12 select A* vs K* -> VA*; D38 КР1533ИР27 (74273 octal D-FF) latches RAM/attribute address; D13 ЛИ1 strobes /RAS,/CAS. РУ5 address pin map in dram_addr_map.
blocks.status: КП12 muxes + ИР23 latch confirmed; A->VA pin map captured (gap_bot_center); RAS/CAS timing model is T3/T5

blocks.timing_gen: D13 (К1533ЛИ1) generates /RAS and /CAS (R15 470 + C5); D43 (ИР22) latches VD0-VD7 onto DATA bus on read
blocks.status: array confirmed (labeled DRAM; power pins 8/16); RAS/CAS source = D13; RAS-before-CAS + refresh-from-counter timing is the T5 model target
ROM confirmed; chip-select decode net TODO

blocks.role: serialize pixel bytes at 14 MHz (KEEP LS timing)
blocks.part_note: К555ИР16 = 4-bit/14-pin shift register (PE/SI/C/OE, D0-D3->Q0-Q3 pins 13/12/11/10), NOT 74LS165. D39=VD0-VD3, D40=VD4-VD7 (=8-bit shifter), D41=3rd nibble/attribute.
blocks.status: members + pin map from redraw; PE/clock/SI nets TODO

blocks.role: combine pixel + attribute (INK/PAPER/BRIGHT/FLASH) + border into R/G/B + intensity
blocks.signal_flow: attributes G0/G1/GB/Y -> D46/D47 КП12 muxes -> BM/RM/GM/YM -> D45 ИР16 register -> BR/RR/GR/YR -> RGB output transistors
blocks.status: members + signal names confirmed from redraw (zoom_connector); attribute decode nets TODO

blocks.role: TTL RGB -> analog levels via КТ315/КТ361 emitter followers + resistor ladder/trimmers
blocks.note: SCART mod: 200 ohm on sync channel; 100 ohm loses color (reference/pinouts/video-pinout.png)
blocks.status: analog; model in ngspice (T6); exact per-color ladder mapping TODO

blocks.role: BEEP/border/tape via port 0xFE; tape-IN squared by the D49 comparator (NOT an LM567 tone decoder)
blocks.connector: X5 "M": pin1=TAPE_OUT? , GND, TAPE_IN (redraw shows TAPE_IN/GND/TAPE_OUT)
blocks.tape_in: X5 -> R30 3k/R31 3k/C7 0.022/R39 5.1k -> D49 К544СА3 comparator (R37 1.8M feedback, R38 3k) -> data bus bit
blocks.beep_out: port 0xFE bit -> R69 33k -> VT2/VT13 КТ315 -> BA1 speaker; border bits -> RGB; R40 820, C32 10uF, R70 470/R71 820 ('S' sound net)
blocks.status: D49=К544СА3 comparator confirmed; exact port-0xFE read/write decode nets TODO

blocks.role: Beta Disk / TR-DOS interface; mainboard carries the address buffer + data latches, FDC is on a daughterboard
blocks.detail: D50 К1533АП3 (74244) buffers AA8-AA15 disk address via КД522 diodes (both halves D50A/D50B); D51 К1533ИР22 latches disk data-in (DI0-DI4 -> D0-D7); D44 К1533ИР22 latch on the disk-data path. Joystick/disk connectors X1('L')/X2('R')/X3('K')/X4/X6.
blocks.status: mainboard buffers/latches fully identified (types + roles); FDC schematic now in reference/schematics/betadisk-controller-bdi.pdf

monitor_signal_group.note: labelled 'места распайки разъёма X7 и сигналов FV,HS,VS,Y,CSYNC,+5В' — a separate solder-point group, distinct pin numbering

X8_bus.role: expansion edge connector, 64-pin = SNP58-64; full Z80 bus (A-side A1..A32, B-side B1..B32 = CONN32_2)
X8_bus.source: redraw symbols (sintez2-original.pdf, t_1_3) + scan X8.1-X8.4 tables
X8_bus.note: High-confidence reads from the redraw connector symbol; a few mid-pins (D0/D2/D6 on A-side, unmarked pins) still to confirm. Carries every Z80 signal — 'all CPU pins + power bus' (manual/video).

X2_R.note: one of X1/X2 omitted at factory per manual/video

X3_K.role: keyboard 'K' (J0-J4 + matrix); RIGHT/LEFT/DOWN/UP/FIRE labels share with joystick

power.rail: +5V single supply (linear PSU: toroidal transformer + LM7805; reference/schematics/sintez2-power-supply.jpg)
power.decoupling: C12...C36 = 24x 0.15uF across the board (3 banks); CH 200pF on sync

ic_power_pins._table: Питание микросхем (schematic right edge), grouped by package
ic_power_pins.note: D49 (К544СА3 analog comparator) powers off the same +5V; pinout per К544СА3 datasheet.

todo: Trace intra-block nets pin-by-pin per block (start: cpu -> decode -> dram -> addr-arbitration, matching milestones T2/T3).
Resolve low-confidence connector pin numbers (X7,X8.2,X1-X4) against the redraw.
Add the keyboard matrix (КП11 mux + port 0xFE read) and the port-0xFE write (border/beep/tape).
Finish the 'Питание микросхем' power-pin table for all ICs.
Once a block is fully traced, mark its 'status':'done' and feed it to bridge/net2sim.py for a SimulIDE smoke test.
